Report.Name: Demand Forecast - PointOfSale - Chart
Report.Description: Consulta para el gráfico de Demand Forecast por punto de venta

With.Name: Main
With.Query: SELECT PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Week] AS [Week], {{ IfRequest -Expression: TotalStock --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions + PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Receptions + --PointOfSaleDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions + PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Stock) AS TotalStock -Expression: Stock --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Stock) AS Stock -Expression: AccumulatedReceptions --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions) AS AccumulatedReceptions -Expression: Receptions --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Receptions) AS Receptions -Expression: Sales --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Sales) AS Sales -Expression: Breakage --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Breakage) AS Breakage -Expression: Order --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Order]) AS [Order] -Expression: PurchaseOrder --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.PurchaseOrder) AS PurchaseOrder -Expression: OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedSales --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedSales) AS AccumulatedSales -Expression: AccumulatedOrders --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrders) AS AccumulatedOrders -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: SimulatedReceptions --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions) AS SimulatedReceptions -Expression: PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrder --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedPurchaseOrder) AS AccumulatedPurchaseOrder -Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple }} FROM Fact.PointOfSaleDemandForecast {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Table: PointOfSaleDemandForecast -On:PointOfSaleId-PointOfSaleId }} {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: PointOfSaleDemandForecast -On: ProductId-ProductId }} GROUP BY PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Week] ORDER BY PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Week]
